vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

risk.mit: Review and adjust part clearances to ensure proper fit

risk.mit: Specify precise fastener patterns and tightening sequences

risk.desc: Risk of water ingress through cable entry grommet
risk.mit: Use waterproof grommets and apply sealing compound

risk.desc: Potential thermal issues due to insufficient cooling fin design.
risk.mit: Increase the number or size of cooling fins to improve heat dissipation.

risk.desc: Risk of cable entanglement due to inadequate cable management.
risk.mit: Implement a more robust cable management system to prevent tangling.

risk.desc: Risk of improper fit between shoulder joint and upper arm link.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough fit tests and adjust as necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient torque on fasteners leading to loosening.
risk.mit: Ensure proper torque settings for all bolts and fasteners.

risk.desc: Risk of structural integrity issues due to unsupported areas in LPBF prints.
risk.mit: Design support structures for LPBF parts to ensure proper orientation during printing.

integration_opportunities.description: Mount additional sensors on cooling fins for better thermal monitoring.
Implement improved cable management system to reduce clutter and potential for tangling.

manufacturing_strategy.process: CNC machining for aluminum parts, LPBF for complex geometries
manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary datum is the base flange face, secondary datum is the shoulder surface.
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: ±0.1mm for machined parts, ±0.2mm for printed parts.
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures will be designed for LPBF parts to ensure proper orientation during printing.
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Inspect parts using CMM for dimensional accuracy.

verification_focus.description: Verify torque settings for all bolts and fasteners.
Conduct fit tests between shoulder joint and upper arm link.
Ensure proper cable routing and strain relief at all joints.
